basic_details.job_title: RSSB Senior & Basic Computer Instructor Recruitment 2026 - 3951 Posts | Apply Online 25 May to 23 June
basic_details.post_name: Senior Computer Instructor & Basic Computer Instructor
basic_details.department: Secondary Education Department & Sanskrit Education Department
basic_details.selection_process_brief: CBT (200 marks) → Document Verification → Medical Exam
basic_details.short_information: RSSB is recruiting 3951 Senior Computer Instructor & Basic Computer Instructor posts with BCA, B.Tech/B.E, M.Sc, M.E/M.Tech, MCA qualification, last date 23 June 2026.

application_fee.payment_mode: e-Mitra / CSC / Net Banking / ATM Debit Card / Credit Card
application_fee.details: Note: The OTR fee is non-refundable but is a one-time registration valid for all future RSSB and RSLDC recruitments. Candidates from outside Rajasthan are treated as General category regardless of caste - they must pay ₹600. Candidates who have already paid OTR fee need not pay again.

age_limit.details: Age is calculated as on 01 January 2027. | Important: For Secondary Education Department posts only, an additional 3 years' relaxation is applicable as no recruitment was held after 2022. This does not apply to Sanskrit Education posts. All age relaxations are non-cumulative.

salary_details.details: Probation Period: 2 years. During probation, fixed remuneration is paid - no regular pay scale, DA, HRA, or TA. After satisfactory completion and confirmation, full pay scale with DA, HRA, TA, NPS, GPF, Gratuity, LTC, and Medical Benefits become applicable.

selection_process: Stage 1 - CBT Merit-based (200 marks) Two papers of 100 marks each. Negative marking of 1/3 per wrong answer. Qualifying: 40% (General), 35% (SC/ST).
Stage 2 - Document Verification Qualifying Candidates shortlisted on merit are called to verify original certificates and documents.
Stage 3 - Medical Examination Qualifying Medical fitness certificate from Chief Medical & Health Officer of the district or Medical Jurist.

pattern_table.Subjects: Art & Culture, History, Geography, General Science & Current Affairs of Rajasthan + Logical Reasoning, Decision Making, Numeracy, Data Interpretation
Pedagogy, Computer Fundamentals, Programming (C, C++, Java, DotNet, AI, ML, Python, Blockchain), Data Structures, OS, DBMS, Networks, Security, Web Development
Pedagogy, Computer Fundamentals, MS Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint), Programming Fundamentals, Data Structures, OS, Networks, DBMS, IoT

pattern_table.Details: Multiple Choice - 5 options (A, B, C, D, E)
Option E must be darkened; 1/3 mark deducted if >10% questions left blank
Applied if exam is conducted in multiple shifts

exam_pattern.details: Paper I is common for both posts. Paper II differs significantly between Senior and Basic levels. | Programming: C, C++, Java, DotNet, AI, ML, Python, Blockchain Data Structures & Algorithms Digital Logic & Computer Organization Operating Systems (incl. Real-Time OS) DBMS & RDBMS Software Engineering & System Analysis Computer Networks (TCP/IP, OSI Model) Network Security & Cryptography Web Development (HTML, CSS, XML, PHP, JavaScript) Pedagogy & Mental Ability | Computer Fundamentals & Number Systems MS Office: Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Access Programming Fundamentals: C, C++, Java, Python, AI, ML Data Structures using C & C++ Computer Organization & OS Communication & Network Concepts Network Security (Firewalls, Ethical Hacking) DBMS & RDBMS System Analysis & Design (UML, Testing) Internet of Things (IoT) & Web Technologies

how_to_apply: Visit the Rajasthan SSO Portal at sso.rajasthan.gov.in and log in with your SSO ID.
If not registered, complete One Time Registration (OTR) - fill category, disability status, and domicile details correctly.
Pay the OTR registration fee through e-Mitra, CSC, Net Banking, ATM Debit Card, or Credit Card.
After OTR, log in to SSO and go to Citizen Apps (G2C) → Recruitment Portal.
Click Apply Now for Advertisement No. 07/2026.
Fill in personal details, educational qualifications, and department preference (Secondary/Sanskrit Education) with priority order.
Upload required documents: qualification certificates, category certificate, domicile, disability certificate (if applicable).
Verify all entries carefully before clicking Final Submit.
Download and save the application with the generated Application ID for future reference.
important_instructions: Applications are online only - no offline applications accepted under any circumstances. OBC certificate must be based on father's name, residence, and income. Husband-based OBC certificates are not valid. EWS income & asset certificate is valid for 1 year from date of issue (extendable up to 3 years with affidavit). Caste certificates issued by non-competent authorities will be rejected at the document verification stage. Name, father's name, date of birth, photo, signature, and thumb impression cannot be changed even in the correction window. Candidates failing to appear in two or more RSSB exams in a financial year may have their OTR blocked. Use of unfair means will lead to debarment and criminal proceedings under the Rajasthan Public Examination (Prevention of Unfair Means) Act, 2022. Any false information will lead to disqualification and potential legal action under IPC Section 217. No TA/DA is payable for attending the CBT exam or document verification.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total vacancy in RSSB Computer Instructor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 3951 posts - 322 Senior Computer Instructor and 3629 Basic Computer Instructor - across Secondary Education and Sanskrit Education Departments in both Non-Scheduled and Scheduled areas of Rajasthan.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for RSSB Computer Instructor 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 23 June 2026 up to 11:59 PM. Candidates must apply through the SSO Recruitment Portal only, as no offline applications are accepted. A correction window of 3 days will also be available after the deadline with a fee of ₹300.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for RSSB Computer Instructor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be between 18 to 40 years of age as on 01 January 2027 for General male applicants. Age relaxation is provided for reserved categories including SC, ST, OBC, EWS, females, PwBD, and ex-servicemen as per Rajasthan government rules. Additional relaxation of 3 years is applicable for Secondary Education posts.

faq.question: Q4. What are the qualifications required for RSSB Computer Instructor 2026?
faq.answer: For Senior Computer Instructor, candidates need a postgraduate degree such as ME, M.Tech, MCA, or M.Sc. in Computer Science/IT or related fields. For Basic Computer Instructor, candidates must have a graduation degree with computer qualifications like BCA, B.Tech, B.Sc. (CS/IT), or PGDCA/'A' Level. Knowledge of Hindi in Devanagari script and Rajasthani culture is mandatory for both posts.

faq.question: Q5. Is there negative marking in RSSB Computer Instructor Exam 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, there is a negative marking of 1/3 mark for each incorrect answer in the exam. Each question has five options (A to E), and candidates must mark option E if they choose to skip a question. Leaving more than 10% questions unanswered without marking any option will lead to additional penalties.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for RSSB Computer Instructor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹600 for General and Creamy Layer OBC/MBC candidates. For Non-Creamy Layer OBC/MBC, EWS, SC, ST, and PwBD candidates of Rajasthan, the fee is ₹400. Candidates from other states are treated as General category and must pay ₹600.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary of RSSB Computer Instructor 2026?
faq.answer: Senior Computer Instructors are paid under Pay Level-10 with a salary range of ₹56,100 to ₹1,77,500. Basic Computer Instructors fall under Pay Level-8 with a salary range of ₹47,600 to ₹1,51,100. During the probation period of 2 years, a fixed remuneration is provided, after which full salary and allowances are applicable.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from other states apply for RSSB Computer Instructor 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates from outside Rajasthan can apply for this recruitment. However, they will be considered under the General category regardless of their caste. They are not eligible for reservation benefits and must pay the full application fee.

faq.question: Q9. Can I edit my RSSB Computer Instructor application form after submission?
faq.answer: Yes, RSSB provides a correction window for 3 days after the application deadline with a fee of ₹300. Additionally, a second correction window of 7 days is available after the exam. However, critical details like name, date of birth, photo, and signature cannot be modified.

faq.question: Q10. When will the RSSB Computer Instructor Admit Card 2026 be released?
faq.answer: The admit card release date has not been officially announced yet by RSSB. It will be made available on the official website rssb.rajasthan.gov.in before the examination. Candidates are advised to regularly check the website for the latest updates and notifications.
